description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a predominantly black exterior accented by vivid green highlights and illuminated striping along the wings and fuselage. The wings are sharply swept back and feature integrated green-lit panels, giving the aircraft a high-tech, stealthy appearance. The cockpit is centrally located at the front, covered by a dark, glossy canopy with a subtle blue tint and intricate surface detailing. The rear of the airplane displays two prominent engine nacelles and a pair of long, slender tail fins extending outward. The surface is smooth and sleek, with visible panel lines and a few raised control elements on the upper fuselage. The overall design suggests a high-performance, possibly unmanned or advanced piloted vehicle suitable for rapid urban deployment.
description: A sleek, black and green futuristic airplane with swept-back wings, illuminated accents, and a glossy forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular nose, glossy cockpit canopy, and the full width of the swept-back wings with green-lit panels.
description_view_1: Left-front oblique view highlights the raised cockpit, illuminated wing accents, and visible surface controls on the upper fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the dual engine nacelles, extended tail fins, and the illuminated trailing edges of the wings.
description_view_3: Right-front oblique view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit, wing details, and the angular, streamlined body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings featuring integrated illuminated panels and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in a widely spaced configuration, forming an H-tail layout.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear present in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single glossy canopy, likely single-seat.
